form.formComment: Back from a 12 weeks spell and last resumed over 388m at Gosford where he was in the placings, finishing second. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished last in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 401m at this track behind Ray's Beauty beaten 22 lengths (24.49). Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.78) when sixth over 388m at Gosford in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from 11 starts. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when sixth (23.72) at this track. Capable and may well bounce back this time.
